estimate.narrative_context: Year-1 deployment: $190K front-load each for James (16) and Sophie (12), gift-split between Marcus and Catherine; Olivia (19, sophomore) likely receives smaller annual contribution rather than full front-load given short remaining horizon.

estimate.narrative_context: Lifetime 529-to-Roth rollover capacity: $35K per beneficiary × 3 children = $105K of next-gen Roth seed capital, accruing tax-free over 30-50 years.

scenario_range.computation_method: Combined $105K rolled over years 15-20 (per beneficiary), then 35-45 years compound growth at 7% tax-free in next-gen Roth IRAs
